events.name: SPAWN
events.description: Drops a new block of the selected kind into a random top column (Spawn button / Space key).

events.name: CYCLE_KIND
events.description: Cycles the selected block kind through grass/dirt/rock/sand.

events.name: CLEAR
events.description: Clears every block and resets the sandbox.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Kind Assets
overridableConfigKeys.description: Sprite per cyclable block kind, indexed with kindNames

overridableConfigKeys.label: Kind Names
overridableConfigKeys.description: Cyclable block kinds, indexed with kindAssets

overridableConfigKeys.label: Tiles
overridableConfigKeys.description: Flat grass backdrop with a darker dirt floor row
